title: Next Generation MC
description: The next generation of Minecraft is here without overhauled terrain biomes and mechanics to bring some fresh new light to the biggest game ever created!
body:
This modpack includes 265 mods that overhaul every aspect of the game into what I truly would call the Next Generation of Minecraft. It uses shaders to make the world stunningly beautiful, and William Wythers Overhauled overworld along with other biome mods to add stunning diversity to the pack. It uses a plethora of resource packs including Detailed animations which completely redoes the player animations, and other qol resource packs to make your experience that much better. (Also fresh animations) The pack also includes tons of structure and mob additions to make the world exciting. The big thing most large packs miss on is the amount of overly technical and non-vanilla mechanics; I make sure to keep a vanilla feel while still making the game harder and redoing the normal hand-wood-stone-iron-diamond system. All of this is coupled with a lot of performance mods to make sure your computer can handle it.
This only lists some of the many amazing mods included in the pack such as:
Camera Overhaul-
OrthoCamera-
Shoulder Surfing Reloaded-
Distant Horizons-
Advanced Netherite-
Continuity-
Blooming Biosphere-
Bind Commands-
Blood Moons-
Horde Nights-
Debugify-
e4mc-
and many Others



Bliss Shaders-[https://github.com/X0nk/Bliss-Shader](https://github.com/X0nk/Bliss-Shader)
